methodology: Scan L-1130..L-1151 (22 lessons) for principle-worthy findings. Sharpe >= 8, Level >= L3 filter. Deduplication against 232 existing principles. Extract generalizable rules into new principles.

principles_registered.name: creation-time-gate
principles_registered.evidence: 81:1 delay ratio without creation-time gates; 0% voluntary compliance across 60 sessions; 88.2% for format-enforced; extends L-601 with temporal precision

principles_registered.name: mode-mismatch-diagnosis
principles_registered.evidence: 4 Goldstone-mode escalation layers failed, 1 massive-mode succeeded; L-815 retroactive confirmation 60 sessions before framework; campaign mode-switch at wave 3 required

secondary_finding.root_cause: maintenance_signals.py:check_periodics() reads only last_reviewed_session; last_session field ignored causing field-drift false zombies
secondary_finding.fix: check_periodics() now reads both fields and uses max(both)

compression_ratio_after: 4.48:1 (K to P, 1049L/234P — improved but still BREAK)
expect: Scan L-1130..L-1151 for principle-worthy findings. Extract >=2 principles. K to P ratio moves toward 5.0:1.
actual: 19/22 lessons met threshold. 5 candidates evaluated, 2 registered (P-317, P-318), 3 deferred. Bug fix in maintenance_signals.py resolves 12x zombie misreport. K to P 4.52 to 4.48.
diff: Expected >=2 principles: CONFIRMED. K to P improvement marginal (dominated by lesson count at this scale). Secondary zombie bug fix was unexpected value-add.
